creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Order
=====

FWIW in my experience (research and academia) it's most common for the bibliography to precede appendices i.e. <https://seamk.libguides.com/instructionsforwrittenwork/layout/bibliographyandappendices>. 

Not set in stone i.e. <https://tex.stackexchange.com/a/6323/14689>; unless the original author(s) have a strong preference for a particular order, I should stick to bibliography first.
